reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) The place is very good, however I received many foreigners who needed a shower which isn't available there; the only thing missing to make it fantastic is a shower.

(Original)
Posto muito bom , porém recebi muitos estrangeiros que precisam de uma ducha que não tem no local , só está faltando ducha para ficar fantástico

reviews.comment:
Hoy me tocó parar en la estación acá de susana  sobre ruta nacional 34 y  en el full nos atendió una chica  de mal humor y con mala predisposición y  muy fiero el café que le pedimos nunca nos tocó algo así. Espero que mejoren.

(Translated by Google)
Today I had to stop at Susana's station on National Route 34, and at the Full service station, we were served by a grumpy and unhelpful girl. The coffee we ordered was awful; we've never had an experience like that. I hope they improve.

reviewReply.comment: Buen día Sebi gracias por tu calificación y reseña, estamos realizando acciones de mejora, te esperamos nuevamente para mejorar tu estadía en la estación!! Saludos

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, para el que viaja y lo agarran las 15pm en la ruta, para y se come una rica hamburguesa, luego una breve siestita y a seguir ruta, excelentes servicios

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service for travelers who get caught on the road around 3 pm. They stop for a delicious hamburger, then take a short nap and continue their journey. Excellent service.

reviewReply.comment: Buen día Nery gracias por tu calificación y reseña te esperamos nuevamente!!

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención por parte del personal. En cuanto al precio, es más barato tomar una palangana de café con una carretillada de  croissants, frente a la torre Eiffel, mientras Wanda Nara te maneja el home banking.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the staff. As for the price, it's cheaper to have a large pot of coffee and a wheelbarrow full of croissants in front of the Eiffel Tower while Wanda Nara handles your online banking.

reviewReply.comment: Buen día Martin, gracias por tu calificación y reseña te esperamos nuevamente!!
